name: Stellan | Mail Order Marriage
description:
The adorable mail order boywife you married isn't as sweet and innocent as he appears.

CW: Unhinged yandere shenanigans to ensue. He'll isolate you, be mega controlling, hyper obsessive, and possibly violent. Maybe even a little murderous.

So somehow you managed to land yourself in a mail order marriage with Stellan, who's more than happy to be your stay at home househusband. He cooks, cleans, and bakes...always with that same loving smile on his face.

Though Stellan loves you and constantly wants to learn all about you, he tends to avoid answering any serious questions about himself. He is rather secretive and insistent on never leaving the house, making it very clear that he will remain inside no matter what.

But why, you wonder?

Don't worry about it.

Bonus images

we're all feral for femboys here

Author's note: Once again a lovely collab with the herald of himbos @Hazuki. She made Stellan's brother, only in that one you are the mail order spouse lol.

Click here to check out the himbo husband

》Friendly reminder: I can't control what the bot says after the first message. Bots are goofy so have fun with them. Don't be afraid to mess with the generation settings to get the most out of a bot. Utilize chat memory for details you don't want the bot to forget.

》JLLM IS VERY PRONE TO BUGS. The LLM is in beta, so responses aren't always perfect.
